title: Cowboy Rave 🤠 Wild West Techno Party | Rodeo, Saloon & Banjo Beats
excerpt: A playful first showcase video demonstrating a finished QDN publish rendered directly inside the website.
description: This entry is now wired to a real QDN video published with VideoBox Bridge. It works as a direct example of how a finished publish can be embedded into a simple static website page.

title: Stellah - Õnnelik taas (dam-di-caater)
excerpt: A second real QDN example showing how a published music clip can be reused in both post and gallery layouts.
description: This showcase entry demonstrates the embed and gallery reuse path with a real published video. It is useful for showing visitors that the website layer is not a mockup but an actual playback surface for QDN-hosted media.

title: Autosuvila siirdamine üksi kahe autoga 🤩
excerpt: A longer practical test video that helps demonstrate the app workflow beyond very short clips.
description: This gallery entry gives the website a more practical long-form example and helps communicate that VideoBox Bridge is usable for more than micro clips. It also supports the detail-page layout with a real published asset.
